337564280.description: The understated color scheme and precision-molded armor plates make this armor a sensible choice for the Helldiver on the go.

1005738384.name: RS-6 Fiend Destroyer

2564970677.name: RS-100 Sanctioner
2564970677.description: Armor inspired by the legend of the Sanctioner, a figure known only through a bizarrely unanimous patchwork of stifled whispers. As told, this fearsome, covert arbiter of primeval Justice delivered final, state-approved verdicts in the chaotic years before the Federation's founding.

3639806567.name: CPR-80 Bulwark
3639806567.description: This armor pays tribute to the immoveable heroes of the front line—those who refuse to acknowledge incoming fire, and consider "dodging" to be an abstract concept akin to cowardice.

2905528295.name: CPR-80 Bulwark

1399805769.name: AF-50 Noxious Ranger

1431213118.name: AF-50 Noxious Ranger

1368467090.name: AF-02 Haz-Master

3285635529.name: UF-16 Inspector

850142972.name: SR-24 Street Scout
850142972.description: This armor's nostalgic color scheme brings to mind beloved trappings of colonial yesteryear: concrete frontier domiciles, slate-colored civilian jumpsuits, and Space Settlers' Pie.

979422228.name: SR-24 Street Scout

84888171.description: Modeled after the Statue of Mournful Liberty, who weeps over the existence of tyranny, this armor is worn by those who would give their lives to dry her tears.

2754954732.name: IE-3 Martyr

2555924814.name: IE-12 Righteous

563831799.name: GS-17 Frontier Marshal

1539200886.description: Embodies the ethos of Manifest Democracy—that it is our voter-given responsibility to emancipate the savage, un-Liberated galaxy. To rest only when every planet is safe, civilized, and Free.

1838148512.description: The heavy plate used in this armor is sustainably sourced from the corpses of non-sentient Automatons, then processed by other, similarly non-sentient Automatons.

2788735945.name: PH-9 Predator
2788735945.description: Based on the uniform of Jackle 6, a veteran of the Viper Commandos who held off an entire Terminid brood on Nublaria in the First Galactic War with nothing but a machine gun, pocket knife, and Orbital Laser Strikes.

1664632640.name: PH-202 Twigsnapper

3728975654.description: The omission of upper-limb coverings allows for optimized freedom of movement, perspiration, and communication of upper body strength to squadmates.

3316979892.name: I-09 Heatseeker
3316979892.description: The burnished blood-red plates are forged in righteous fire, like the heroes they were wrought to protect.

267424901.name: I-102 Draconaught
267424901.description: Completely sheathed in 14-cm silica fiber foam, except for a thin tube to the ear canal to enable hearing the satisfying screeches of Freedom's enemies as they burn.

2794703739.name: I-102 Draconaught
2794703739.description: Completely sheathed in 14-cm silica fiber foam, except for a thin tube to the ear canal to enable hearing the satisfying screeches of Freedom's enemies as they burn.

888714536.description: The breathing apparatus built into this equipment helps both soldiers and colonists thrive, even when assigned to planets with atmospheres rated "suboptimal," "extreme," and "character building."

2800085991.description: The breathing apparatus built into this equipment helps both soldiers and colonists thrive, even when assigned to planets with atmospheres rated "suboptimal," "extreme," and "character building."

1631026563.name: AC-2 Obedient
1631026563.description: The muted colors and relaxed, high-mobility fit make this a favorite among long-distance snipers and hide-and-seek champions alike.

3352094518.name: AC-2 Obedient
3352094518.description: The muted colors and relaxed, high-mobility fit make this a favorite among long-distance snipers and hide-and-seek champions alike.

962975775.name: RS-89 Shadow Paragon
962975775.description: Armor befitting infiltrators of all caliber. Inspired by mythical Democracy-dispensers, whose meticulously undocumented operations remain an inspiration to all students of stealth.

267139539.name: RS-67 Null Cipher
267139539.description: This armor, coated in radar-absorbent polymers and a null-signature heat baffle, reportedly turns its wearer into a sensor ghost—a claim attributed to individuals who, curiously, appear to have never existed.

3157942416.name: RS-67 Null Cipher
3157942416.description: This armor, coated in radar-absorbent polymers and a null-signature heat baffle, reportedly turns its wearer into a sensor ghost—a claim attributed to individuals who, curiously, appear to have never existed.

111225460.name: CPG-48 Sapper
111225460.description: With extra capacity for storing throwable munitions, this armor ensures every enemy stronghold can be tactically ventilated, as per forceful de-fortification protocols.

192432627.name: CPH-26 Commandant
192432627.description: Featuring a high collar scientifically designed to deflect mud, blood, and indirect non-lethal projectiles, this pristine armor bestows the authority to overcome close-quarters combat through a time-honored tradition: the delegation—or court-martialing—of subordinates.

2037274048.name: FS-23 Battle Master
2037274048.description: This aim-stabilizing armor found surprising secondary market success among alien birdwatching enthusiasts.

1452909167.name: FS-23 Battle Master
1452909167.description: This aim-stabilizing armor found surprising secondary market success among alien birdwatching enthusiasts.

2899116161.name: TR-62 Knight
2899116161.description: Crafted to deliver Justice to the darkest crevices of the galaxy.

2694550156.name: TR-62 Knight
2694550156.description: Crafted to deliver Justice to the darkest crevices of the galaxy.

2121537836.name: CW-36 Winter Warrior
2121537836.description: Offering camouflage in snowy environments, surplus sets of this armor are used by nature photographers and keen hunters alike.

108697242.name: CW-36 Winter Warrior
108697242.description: Offering camouflage in snowy environments, surplus sets of this armor are used by nature photographers and keen hunters alike.

3690580532.name: Light of Eternal Liberty
3690580532.description: The unimpeachable justice of this cape's design is said to blind the enemies of Freedom with its glorious light.

2653547055.name: Bastion of Integrity
2653547055.description: Based on a SEAF Signaller's Cape, which was intended to enable easy location of fallen heroes by aerial recovery crews.

4111053667.name: Agent of Oblivion
4111053667.description: 0.05% of profits are donated to Superstone National Park, as part of the Ministry of Unity's "Greener Galaxy" campaign.

1695626205.name: Beacon of Mercy
1695626205.description: The clasps on this cape are made from melted down Automaton housings—evidence of Democracy's inevitable triumph.

2592491111.name: Drape of Glory
2592491111.description: Research suggests that Helldivers wearing this cape are seen as 17% more patriotic.

2007907056.name: Will of the People
2007907056.description: Contains a grain of sand from Super Earth—so its bearers carry a small piece of Liberty with them, wherever they go.

2002245864.name: Protector of the Heart
2002245864.description: When the Illuminate threatened Super Earth, the very Heart of Democracy, the Helldivers answered the call.

1513263450.name: Thundering Hooves of Loyalty
1513263450.description: No dissident or alien, no creature big or small, can ever hope to stand against the furious stampede of Managed Democracy.

3822047995.name: Prosperous Green
3822047995.description: All Hail the Helldivers, who bring untold abundance to Super Earth's citizens.

3076249017.name: Reckoning's Cheer
3076249017.description: When facing the enemies of Freedom this Reckoningtide, keep up the festive spirit by recalling the opening line of A Vengeant Carol: "They'll soon be dead, to begin with."

1838911009.name: United in Equality
1838911009.description: To honor the heartfelt siblinghood of the heroes who stood together, bled together, and laid down their lives together in defense of Equality-On-Sea, all Helldivers are awarded one (1) commemorative polyester cape.

1917397047.name: Against the Tyrant Cloud
1917397047.description: No oppressive murk, no fascist penumbra, no dictatorial haze and no unfree emanation; no tyrannical Gloom shall ever stand a chance against the searing light of Helldiver fire.

4028901518.name: Veridical Ideology
4028901518.description: This cape celebrates the one Veridical Ideology—Managed Democracy—a truth so self-evident, it requires no proof beyond the unwavering obedience of its champions.

2632342951.name: Red Planet's Memory
2632342951.description: The memory of the Martian training grounds will endure, even after all the Helldivers who trained there have passed, some day in the far future.

4112773733.name: Proud Gold
4112773733.description: All Hail the Helldivers, whose resplendent honor makes Tyrants tremble.

114199832.name: Patriot Blue
114199832.description: All Hail the Helldivers, whose devotion to Managed Democracy has never faltered.

1902399433.name: Ingress-81
1902399433.description: This cape reminds us that even faced with the abyssal darkness of space, nothing can stand against our human ingenuity, our powers of collaboration, or our sheer overwhelming numbers.

66704491.name: Cover of Darkness
66704491.description: When children have trouble sleeping, tucking them in under this cape reminds them that they are never alone, for Liberty's unseen defenders are always watching over them.

1123234369.name: Stone-Wrought Perseverance
1123234369.description: When wearers stand shoulder to shoulder, this cape shows them as they truly are: an unbreakable defense, keeping Freedom safe behind an impregnable wall.

1165305553.name: Vision of Freedom
1165305553.description: Artists and sculptors have made countless attempts at depicting the face of Liberty, but the truth is that any citizen can see it—they need only requisition a mirror.

452377187.name: Veil of the Valorous Vagabond
452377187.description: Legend tells of the unnamed Helldiver, wandering the edges of Super Earth's reach, delivering Democracy and leveling lawlessness wherever the tumbleweeds lead. Wear this, and keep the legend alive.

2679756720.name: Seal of General Consensus
2679756720.description: Made famous by the SEAF commander of the same name, this seal reminds us that only perfect Unity can ensure perfect Freedom.

4129649228.name: Schema Laid Bare
4129649228.description: This cape depicts the inner workings of a medical device submitted to the Ministry of Science 70 years ago, and is bound to clear their patent approval process any day now.

3041241535.name: Badge of Order
3041241535.description: This sigil reaffirms the Helldiver's pledge to protect Managed Democracy, serve Managed Democracy, and uphold Managed Democracy.

4111578760.name: Eternal Corona
4111578760.description: Featuring an ancient sun symbol and a distressed look, this cape reminds us that the light of Liberty is everlasting, and will keep shining even when we ourselves have become tattered and frayed.

285054471.name: De-Forester's Sailcloth
285054471.description: This convenient cape can double as ground insulation, warming blanket, or camp roofing to the enterprising defoliator.

3555231182.name: Gilded Quill
3555231182.description: The golden, piercing quills symbolize the deadly and poetic Justice delivered to seditious oppositionists. Silent sanctions, delivered with unerring precision and incontestable deniability.

3026953460.name: Testament to Attrition
3026953460.description: Salvaged from a deep-storage vault, this well-ventilated cape symbolizes tenacious survival. Its visible scars bestow immediate veteran status, reminding all onlookers that the spirit of tireless service is immortal.

342959649.name: Standard of Safe Distance
342959649.description: By reminding Chemical Agents of proper distancing rules, this extraordinary innovation in cape design ensures that they never cause another unfortunate outbreak of Carcino-Plague.

4237429476.name: Patient Zero's Rememberance
4237429476.description: With this cape we honor the bio-warfare pioneers of Division Zero, conscripted from quarantine zones and hospices to spread their Carcino-Plague on the battlefield.

1126585234.name: Pride of the Whistleblower
1126585234.description: Granted to the Truth Enforcers' Informant of the Month, this tasteful cape conjures images of dissident blood on asphalt.

3965478926.name: Proof of Faultless Virtue
3965478926.description: This cape signifies that its wearer thinks, feels, and acts correctly at all times, and thus bears the responsibility to educate and re-educate their fellow citizen.

3519089118.name: Greatcloak of Rebar Resolve
3519089118.description: Inside the collar is embroidered: "Wherever I may plant my shield, know that I will never yield," and "machine washable."

4171120414.name: Holder of the Yellow Line
4171120414.description: Since ancient times, the yellow line has symbolized an uncrossable boundary. To don this cape is to draw that line between tyranny and liberty, between alien monstrosities and Super Earth property, and never yield the right of way.

958121814.name: Fre Liberam
958121814.description: Each purchase of this cape comes with a complimentary will and testament amendment form, which guarantees the soon-to-be-deceased a prominent spot on the Wall of Martyrs.

147568459.name: Per Democrasum
147568459.description: This cape honors the Eagle pilots who would follow a Stratagem beacon into the very jaws of tyranny, even when the beacon's placement seems inscrutable to the non-Helldiver mind.

3164866294.name: Reaper of Bounties
3164866294.description: This cape recalls the popular folk tale of the "Freedomslingers": re-educated dissidents, seeking redemption on the Federation's Borderline, hunting dangerous thought-traitors in exchange for ballot bounties.

975741671.name: Way of the Bandolier
975741671.description: The dauntless pioneers of the Great Expansion, facing the un-Democratic unknown, adopted the Way of the Bandolier. With the gusto of their covering fire making up for their modest accuracy, they strived to be perfectly aligned in their shared values, and ready to serve when called upon by the machine gun of civic duty.

456906913.name: Federation's Embrace
456906913.description: When donning the One True Flag, one must face the direction of Super Earth, recite the Super Earth Anthem, and salute one's own image in the nearest reflective surface. Wrongful discarding of this cape is a capital offense.

1440027723.name: Humble Regalia
1440027723.description: This modest cape has been worn by those guarding the Chamber of Unanimous Decision since time immemorial.

3954339443.name: Conductor of Brilliance
3954339443.description: The embroidered pattern uses aluminium from Automaton motherboards, granting the once-wretched metals a new and noble purpose.

376718346.name: Over Artifice Triumphant
376718346.description: Humanity's intellect shines brighter than all other, piercing even the treacherous darkness that spawned the Automatons' pseudo-sentience; the darkness known as computer science.

1148253951.name: Miranda's Legacy
1148253951.description: Although Super Citizen Miranda's true identity has been lost to time, most legal historians agree that she was once a patron of highly-efficient interrogation techniques.

1006046695.name: Mother Eagle's Wings
1006046695.description: Those taken under the wings of the Law can rest easy knowing that their transgressions will soon be laid bare, their harms amended, and their citizenship safely sequestered.

819008890.name: Rightful Occupier
819008890.description: Painted by visionary artist Silas Garm during an intense fever, this symbol represents Humanity's great Galactic endeavor: the blood-soaked dawn of Lasting Peace.

2129553675.name: Windswept Wayfinder
2129553675.description: It is well-documented that soldiers raised on harsh planets have an advantage when fighting in similar environments; this insight is foundational to the Democratic Youth Scouts Exchange Program.

4282790522.name: Dissident's Nightmare
4282790522.description: After extensive testing in Patriotic Rehabilitation Centers, this design was proved most terrifying to dissent-afflicted individuals.

2871629098.name: Pinions of Everlasting Glory
2871629098.description: All but ensures ascension to the immortal ranks of those enshrined in the Super Earth Digital Archive of Valorous Acts.

3892781112.name: Order of the Venerated Ballot
3892781112.description: Adorned with the insignia of the Order of the Venerated Ballot, a Ministry-sanctioned Patriot's Club for citizens who pledge themselves to preserving the sanctity of voting.

2646411735.name: MARK OF THE CRIMSON FANG
2646411735.description: Marks the most obedient of the obedient, those who will strike headlong at the veins of Tyranny and administer the sweet antidote of Freedom.

291340630.name: EXECUTIONER'S CANOPY
291340630.description: Crests the shoulders of those who deliver the final—and most indispensable—stroke of Justice.

939953131.name: Strength in Our Arms
939953131.description: The symbol on this cape represents the pillars of freedom: duty, obedience, and loyalty.

1113633420.name: Defender of Our Dream
1113633420.description: Commemorating the New Stockholm treaty on prisoners of war, this cape celebrates the right of all enemy combatants to a swift and merciful execution.

4083075675.name: Mark of the Constrictor
4083075675.description: Marks the most Free of the Free, those who will seize tyranny by the neck and squeeze until no oppression remains.

1691924999.name: Foe Rent Asunder
1691924999.description: This ancient, likely allegorical, illustration of Might triumphing over the Anguiform is seen by scholars as a symbol of humankind's supremacy in the art of violence.

1392007336.name: Honored Heirloom
1392007336.description: Should the wearer of this cape perish at the hands of Freedom's enemies, it is customary to pass the cape on to their bravest child during the funeral, inspiring the next generation to take up arms.

3837863752.name: Eye of the Clandestine
3837863752.description: Those who serve Liberty from the shadows often elect to stay anonymous, moving like traceless specters through the night. May they watch over us always.

2491991003.name: Rags of the Fashionable
2491991003.description: Gently stonewashed by experienced hands, this luxury cape exudes the essence of state-approved attitude.

585941262.name: Wedgeful Tricorn
585941262.description: Designed in homage to the triangle—the most immovable of shapes—this cape digs its heels into the eye of the observer, leaving a lasting impression.

1325899013.name: Pillar of the Abyss
1325899013.description: A cape inspired by hypothetical covert operatives—pillars of Democratic order, operating in the hostile abyss where Liberty's light cannot yet reach.

114520195.name: Triangulation Veil
114520195.description: This vision-disruptive pattern cloaks the silent crusaders whose untraceable deeds are a pure expression of true Freedom: freedom from accountability.

2630208565.name: Dignity of Toil
2630208565.description: Woven from coarse, industrial fibers designed to absorb sweat and oil, this cape features a spade emblem to honor Super Earth's groundbreakers, who ensure Liberty’s light finds its way through any planet’s crust.

1031686855.name: Crest of the Unsullied
1031686855.description: With sharp geometric angles to symbolize the rigid chain of command, this cape embodies the sanctity and moral fortitude of unblemished leadership over the mud-caked warriors they direct.

2321467216.name: Tideturner
2321467216.description: Some say that a mere glimpse of this cape, fluttering majestically in the breeze, is enough to spur a squad to victory.

3058055083.name: Tyranny's Bane
3058055083.description: Designed by fashion legend RH Gant, the pattern seen on this cape also appears on domestic dresses and gun-warmers.

391288265.name: Agent of Oblivion
391288265.description: 0.05% of profits are donated to Superstone National Park, as part of the Ministry of Unity's "Greener Galaxy" campaign.

4124916847.name: Unblemished Allegiance
4124916847.description: A choir of patriotic schoolchildren sings the Super Earth anthem to each cape as the final step in its production.

1853027475.name: Light of Eternal Liberty
1853027475.description: The unimpeachable justice of this cape's design is said to blind the enemies of Freedom with its glorious light.

1675418984.name: Will of the People
1675418984.description: Contains a grain of sand from Super Earth—so its bearers carry a small piece of Liberty with them, wherever they go.

1404455928.name: Cresting Honor
1404455928.description: The yellow is the exact shade of the Ministry of Unity's 'Golden Gate', leading to the Chamber of Unanimous Decision.

3562998132.name: Liberty's Herald
3562998132.description: The two stripes serve as a reminder of the two pillars of successful military campaigns: attack, and further attack.

1180159923.name: Foesmasher
1180159923.description: Durable, waterproof, and thermally-lined, surplus units of this cape are favored by domestic campers, to make tents.

752209840.name: Independence Bringer
752209840.description: This cape's cropped length symbolizes the brevity of galactic conflicts, thanks to the efficiency of the Helldivers.

3359335006.name: Drape of Glory
3359335006.description: Research suggests that Helldivers wearing this cape are seen as 17% more patriotic.

1790198010.name: Wings of Valor
1790198010.description: Based on the ceremonial pennant flags of early Super Earth, which now adorn the entrance to each Ministry.

285943304.name: Beacon of Mercy
285943304.description: The clasps on this cape are made from melted down Automaton housings—evidence of Democracy's inevitable triumph.

2779185355.name: Unblemished Allegiance
2779185355.description: A choir of patriotic schoolchildren sings the Super Earth anthem to each cape as the final step in its production.

112836163.name: Drape of Glory
112836163.description: Research suggests that Helldivers wearing this cape are seen as 17% more patriotic.

2906140436.name: Resupply
2906140436.description: A Hellpod containing four supply packs, to replenish personal ammunition and stims in the field.

1030888251.name: G-31 Arc
1030888251.description: A throwable device engineered to bounce when hitting the ground, releasing bursts of electricity on each impact. Warning: may bounce unpredictably.

189227448.name: G-48 Giga Grenade
189227448.description: Designed to render even the largest foes into considerably smaller, and vastly more compliant, constituent parts. Sacrifices throwing range for a massive detonation on impact.

2823164517.name: G-16 Impact
2823164517.description: A high explosive grenade which detonates on first impact.

131945085.name: G-89 Smokescreen
131945085.description: A smoke grenade that rapidly deploys a small, dense cloud. Allows for rapid personal concealment and exfiltration.

16338515.name: G-13 Incendiary Impact
16338515.description: Detonates on impact, covering the immediate vicinity in self-igniting white phosphorus.

1925755439.name: B-1 Supply Pack
1925755439.description: Supply boxes containing ammunition, with a backpack that allows the user to distribute boxes to fellow Helldivers.

1028872423.name: SH-20 Ballistic Shield Backpack
1028872423.description: A backpack which can be wielded as a one-handed ballistic shield, protecting against small arms fire.

4255545685.name: B-100 Portable Hellbomb
4255545685.description: A backpack-mounted Hellbomb that can be armed by the wearer or an ally, starting a countdown. Users are recommended to remove the backpack before the countdown reaches zero.

3413503378.name: B/MD C4 Pack
3413503378.description: A backpack containing six adhesive C4 charges and a handheld wireless electronic detonator. Charges can be deployed and detonated individually, or as multiple simultaneous blasts.

519340933.name: B/MD C4 Pack
519340933.description: A backpack containing six adhesive C4 charges and a handheld wireless electronic detonator. Charges can be deployed and detonated individually, or as multiple simultaneous blasts.

1382612374.name: SH-51 Directional Shield
1382612374.description: A one-handed device that deploys a wide energy barrier in front of the user. The barrier is semipermeable and blocks high-speed projectiles from the outside only, leaving the user free to shoot through it.

3253029690.name: LIFT-182 Warp Pack
3253029690.description: A Dark Fluid-powered backpack that generates a portable micro-wormhole. This safe and well-understood technology allows the wearer to warp short distances. Warning: do not use while pack is overloaded.

3883022479.name: AX/FLAM-75 Hot Dog
3883022479.description: An autonomous drone equipped with a flamethrower. Returns to backpack to refill fuel canisters.

4243413869.name: AX/TX-13 Dog Breath
4243413869.description: A drone that defends its user by firing caustic gas at nearby enemies, blinding and slowing them temporarily. Returns to backpack to refill.

2700946317.name: AX/AR-23 Guard Dog
2700946317.description: An autonomous drone equipped with a Liberator assault rifle, providing 360° cover. Returns to backpack to rearm.

1440244352.name: AX/LAS-5 Rover
1440244352.description: An autonomous drone equipped with a laser rifle, providing 360° cover. Returns to backpack to cool down.

1875465746.name: AX/ARC-3 K-9
1875465746.description: A humane, autonomous drone equipped with a modified Arc Thrower. Capable of projecting arcs of lightning through multiple targets. Does not need to recharge between shots.

452826786.name: LIFT-860 Hover Pack
452826786.description: Offers its user brief fixed-height flight, stable enough for pinpoint marksmanship.

2649062090.name: LIFT-850 Jump Pack
2649062090.description: Enables the user to jump higher than 'gravity' and 'safety' would normally allow. Must be charged before use.

4010403312.name: SH-20 Medic Backpack
4010403312.description: A backpack which can be wielded as a one-handed ballistic shield, protecting against small arms fire.

2771075958.name: CQC-20 Breaching Hammer
2771075958.description: A sledgehammer that can be wielded with or without an explosive charge attached to its head.

2518036308.name: CQC-19 Stun Lance
2518036308.description: A melee weapon tipped with electrified prongs that temporarily stun targets. Can be wielded one-handed.

4133671573.name: CQC-72 Entrenchment Tool
4133671573.description: A shovel that can be used as a melee weapon or, more conventionally, to dig holes in the ground.

2173315377.name: CQC-72 Entrenchment Tool
2173315377.description: A shovel that can be used as a melee weapon or, more conventionally, to dig holes in the ground.

2088854385.name: SG-8 Punisher
2088854385.description: A powerful dual magazine pump-action shotgun, with limited armor penetration. Ideal for small and fast targets.

1934208922.name: SG-8F Punisher Fire Of Liberty
1934208922.description: Punisher shotgun variant modifier with burst fire of incendiary round and a large drum magazine.

2246547985.name: SG-8S Slugger
2246547985.description: A modified Punisher shotgun firing heavy, high-damage slug rounds. Perfect for punching big holes in big targets.

122941246.name: SG-20 Halt
122941246.description: A humane compliance weapon with two separate magazines: one for armor-penetrating flechette rounds and one for stun rounds.

1321109120.name: SG-451 Cookout
1321109120.description: A pump shotgun that fires a burst of incendiary phosphorus pellets, setting targets ablaze.

3955657629.name: SG-8P Punisher Plasma
3955657629.description: A modified Punisher shotgun firing exploding plasma rounds. Fire carefully - exploding plasma can injure squadmates.

931633769.name: SG-97 Sweeper
931633769.description: A slamfire shotgun: fires continuously while the trigger is depressed, via activation of the pump-action mechanism. Loaded with armor-piercing flechettes and equipped with an extended bayonet.

3417185725.name: DBS-2 Double Freedom
3417185725.description: With its two barrels, one trigger, and vintage feel, this shotgun is perfect for historical reenactments.

3414013062.name: M90A Shotgun
3414013062.description:
A top-loaded shotgun prominently featured in the final episode of "Obedient Democracy Support Troopers."
Produced by Martian Armory.

2161995568.name: MP-98 Knight
2161995568.description: A submachine gun with an extremely high rate of fire, which can be operated with one hand. Ideal for multitasking.

2011243293.name: SMG/FLAM-34 Stoker
2011243293.description: A versatile submachine gun equipped with iron sights and frontline incineration capabilities.

1179533432.name: StA-11 Smg
1179533432.description: A submachine gun with a helical-feed magazine, which gives the weapon a higher ammo capacity while making it more front-heavy. Produced by Stål Arms.

1246313930.name: M7S Smg
1246313930.description:
An SMG that fires caseless ammunition and is equipped with a non-removable suppressor. 
Produced by Martian Armory.

725205791.name: SMG-32 Reprimand
725205791.description: A heavy-duty submachine gun that fires large-caliber rounds, with a slower rate of fire to manage the high recoil. Ideal for use at close to medium range.

3478892931.name: PLAS-39 Accelerator Rifle
3478892931.description: A high-precision burst-fire plasma rifle that must be charged to fire.

469340936.name: VG-70 Variable
469340936.description: A speed-loaded volley gun with three different firing modes and three different RPM options. Warning: recoil varies significantly between firing modes.

207998803.name: P-92 Warrant
207998803.description: A pistol firing bursts of guided, jet-propelled ammunition. Can be set to non-guided mode at any time, removing the need to lock on to targets.

358989959.name: P-33 Missile Pistol
358989959.description: A pistol firing guided, jet-propelled ammunition. It's lock-on feature ensures high accuracy, but the weapon must be reloaded after every round fired.

2811723672.name: P-2 Peacemaker
2811723672.description: The SEAF standard pistol - offering a high fire rate, generous capacity, and fast reloading.

1084288106.name: P-11 Stim Pistol
1084288106.description: Fires a ballistic dart at near-supersonic speeds, allowing the user to stim allies from a distance. Might sting.

1639574879.name: G-7 Pineapple
1639574879.description: A cluster fragmentation grenade. The shrapnel submunition allows it to inflict damage over a large area.

385461545.name: TED-63 Dynamite
385461545.description: Creates a far-reaching incendiary blast ideal for crowd control against smaller enemies of Freedom. Equipped with a programmable timer for strategic versatility.

3466282658.name: G/SH-39 Shield
3466282658.description: A throwable emplacement that generates a spherical, projectile-blocking shield on impact. Has a limited lifetime once deployed.

375014954.name: G-23 Stun
375014954.description: Temporarily stuns all targets within the effective radius.

3295898003.name: G-6 Frag
3295898003.description: An antipersonnel fragmentation grenade. Creates damage over a large area when detonated.

1255689962.name: G-4 Gas
1255689962.description: A grenade that releases a cloud of toxic gas, effective at temporarily blinding and slowing both organic and inorganic enemies.

3191303848.name: G-12 High Explosive
3191303848.description: A high explosive grenade which damages lightly armored targets. Creates high damage over a small area when detonated.

3748749890.name: G-10 Incendiary
3748749890.description: An incendiary grenade which ignites any targets and terrain within the blast radius. Use with caution.

1752129915.name: TM-1 Lure Mine
1752129915.description: A throwable anti-personnel mine, capable of adhering to most surfaces. Upon deployment, emits lights and sounds which attract nearby hostiles to its proximity-activated detonator.

1789694805.name: G-50 Seeker
1789694805.description: This grenade delivery drone follows the user until it detects an enemy nearby, then flies toward it and explodes on impact. Has a limited battery life.

2877510587.name: G-3 Smoke
2877510587.description: A 'compliance weapon' to modify enemy behaviour. Creates a thick smoke screen to block targets' line of sight.

3869545997.name: G-123 Thermite
3869545997.description: A thermite grenade designed to adhere to surfaces before burning at 2000°C. Capable of burning through some armor.

1625792993.name: G-109 Urchin
1625792993.description: This humane device attaches to its target and dispenses repeated electrical pulses, keeping the target in place for humane apprehension and/or termination.

1858752103.name: K-2 Throwing Knife
1858752103.description: Delivers silent justice to Freedom's enemies.

1612683909.name: G-142 Pyrotech
1612683909.description: A repurposed firework that showers its immediate surrounding area in sparks before exploding. As delightful as it is incendiary.

3744531484.name: SG-88 Break-Action Shotgun
3744531484.description: A shotgun used in colonies to hunt and protect from threats.

397581595.name: B/MD C4 Pack
397581595.description: A backpack containing six adhesive C4 charges and a handheld wireless electronic detonator. Charges can be deployed and detonated individually, or as multiple simultaneous blasts.

4109429659.name: CQC-2 Saber
4109429659.description: A one-handed ceremonial sword suitable for use in parades, sabrage, and combat.

1214427163.name: CQC-9 Defoliation Tool
1214427163.description: A useful field-clearing tool for removing trees, obstacles, and unlucky foes.

3197732872.name: CQC-30 Stun Baton
3197732872.description: A lightweight melee weapon that temporarily stuns enemies.

819954976.name: CQC-1 One True Flag
819954976.description: The eternal colors of Super Earth can never be tainted. Only quenched, by the blood of its enemies.

3859022603.name: CQC-42 Machete
3859022603.description: A heavy one-handed blade. Slower to swing than other melee weapons, but deals more damage.

999487482.name: ARC-12 Blitzer
999487482.description: This shotgun blasts a wide burst of high-voltage electricity that arcs between all units—enemy or otherwise—within range.

2852344585.name: AR-23 Liberator
2852344585.description: The SEAF standard assault rifle, balancing power, fire rate, and weight for a reliable weapon against smaller targets.

1676113140.name: AR-23P Liberator Penetrator
1676113140.description: A modified Liberator fitted with a scope and firing armor-piercing rounds, to help users take down armored targets.

376039023.name: AR-23C Liberator Concussive
376039023.description: A modified Liberator firing concussive rounds which do less damage but stagger enemies.

3428996225.name: AR/GL-21 One-Two
3428996225.description: A combination assault rifle/grenade launcher. Versatile, but heavy to wield.

3344526787.name: StA-52 Assault Rifle
3344526787.description:
An assault rifle with a high-capacity drum magazine, good for providing sustained fire. 
Produced by Stål Arms.

3623018063.name: AR-32 Pacifier
3623018063.description: A large-capacity assault rifle firing humane stun rounds. Reports of lethal incidents have been thoroughly debunked.

400301984.name: AR-2 Coyote
400301984.description: A reliable assault rifle with an antique iron sight, firing incendiary ammunition.

2564789309.name: MA5C Assault Rifle
2564789309.description:
Often showcased in the "Obedient Democracy Support Troopers" cartoon, this assault rifle comes with a convenient ammo counter and compass.
Produced by Martian Armory.

1160920394.name: AR-23A Liberator Carbine
1160920394.description: A compact version of the Liberator designed for increased viability in close quarters. Has an increased fire rate at the cost of higher spread.

1920374015.name: AR-61 Tenderizer
1920374015.description: A high-caliber assault rifle with a restrictive magazine size but more stopping power.

2643754746.name: AR-59 Suppressor
2643754746.description: A fully automatic assault rifle featuring a non-removable suppressor and subsonic ammunition. Slower rounds allow low-profile operation.

1182300424.name: SG-225 Breaker
1182300424.description: A fully-automatic shotgun with a high rate of fire, excellent for controlling crowds. Requires frequent reloading.

3814689025.name: SG-225SP Breaker Spray&Pray
3814689025.description: A modified Breaker shotgun firing birdshot, small pellets which saturate an area to clear up smaller targets.

3068666625.name: SG-225IE Breaker Incendiary
3068666625.description: A modified Breaker shotgun firing incendiary projectiles. Generates heat during use, so limited to burst fire.

2640366401.name: BR-14 Adjudicator
2640366401.description: An accurate, armor-penetrating rifle, the BR-14 Adjudicator delivers righteous judgement to medium-sized enemies, though its restrictive magazine limits its effectiveness against large groups.

3757606668.name: R-2 Amendment
3757606668.description: A semi-automatic ceremonial rifle equipped with a bayonet. Can be set to fire in three-shot bursts, to easily conduct the Fallen Hero's Salute.

4161086429.name: R-2124 Constitution
4161086429.description: This ceremonial rifle is modeled after antique relics from pre-Democratic times. It is traditionally gifted to every citizen upon turning 16 to encourage service.

1942567317.name: CB-9 Exploding Crossbow
1942567317.description: Fires powerful exploding bolts which do maximum damage upon direct impact. Gravity must be accounted for when aiming.

4108040377.name: FLAM-66 Torcher
4108040377.description: A lightweight flamethrower. Shoots pressurized fuel through a dispersion nozzle into an open flame. Safe.

2121387072.name: JAR-5 Dominator
2121387072.description: Firing jet-propelled rounds, the Dominator trades fire rate and magazine capacity for increased damage per projectile.

339272294.name: R-36 Eruptor
339272294.description: This bolt-action rifle fires jet-assisted shells that explode shrapnel in all directions upon impact. Not recommended for close-quarters use.

3866352840.name: LAS-5 Scythe
3866352840.description: A laser rifle firing a continuous beam. Does not need reloading, but if it overheats a new heat sink must be fitted.

1794436168.name: LAS-16 Sickle
1794436168.description: A laser rifle, firing in short bursts. Does not need reloading, but if it overheats a new heat sink must be fitted.

309178703.name: LAS-17 Double-Edge Sickle
309178703.description: A LAS-16 Sickle model with all overheating protections conveniently removed, allowing for far longer bursts of fire. Does more damage when overheated, at the cost of slightly burning the user.

2870692210.name: Las-13 Trident
2870692210.description: This time-honored shotgun-like weapon has been improved since the First Galactic War, and now fires six beams instead of three.

2104346664.name: R-6 Deadeye
2104346664.description: A mighty rifle with a signature lever-action enabling single round reload. Powerful precision suited to mid- and long-range combat.

1978117092.name: M-105 Stalwart
1978117092.description: A compact, low caliber machine gun. Trades power for ease of use, with faster reloading than heavier machine guns.

2232169940.name: R-4 Hyena
2232169940.description: A heavy, large-caliber marksman rifle bridging the gap between precision and sheer stopping power. Fires armor-piercing rounds coated in a high-ignition thermite compound to ignite targets.

838686177.name: R-72 Censor
838686177.description: A mid-range precision rifle. Equipped with an integrated suppressor and subsonic rounds for barely-detectable operation.

2307301438.name: R-63 Diligence
2307301438.description: This high-caliber marksman rifle trades magazine capacity and rate of fire for powerful, accurate shots.

924530093.name: R-63CS Diligence Counter Sniper
924530093.description: A modified Diligence rifle offering increased damage at the cost of some maneuverability. Fires a single bullet at a time.

2821209932.name: SMG-37 Defender
2821209932.description: A high-caliber submachine gun which can be fired with one hand. Has a relatively low rate of fire.

942049262.name: SMG-72 Pummeler
942049262.description: Fires concussive rounds that stagger enemies. Slower rate of fire than other SMGs.

925809350.name: PLAS-1 Scorcher
925809350.description: A plasma rifle, firing a bolt of superheated gas which explodes on impact. Avoid standing in proximity to the blast.

2887941494.name: PLAS-101 Purifier
2887941494.description: A plasma rifle that fires bolts of superheated gas, which can be charged by holding down the trigger. Charging up a shot fully makes the bolt explode on impact.

2264358800.name: SG-22 Bushwhacker
2264358800.description: A triple-barreled, break-action, sawed-off shotgun. Switch firing modes to fire all three barrels at once.

3981773112.name: P-19 Redeemer
3981773112.description: A fully-automatic pistol with an extremely high fire rate, allowing for efficient crowd control.

1102600214.name: P-35 Re-Educator
1102600214.description: A dart-firing pistol. Each of its six rounds administers a gaseous chemical agent, harmful to hostiles whether organic or artificial, that also induces a state of delirium in the target.

1920655850.name: LAS-58 Talon
1920655850.description: An accurate, hard-hitting laser revolver with bespoke break action for heat sink swaps.

2340232366.name: P-72 Crisper
2340232366.description: A compact handgun-style flamethrower, able to project a jet of fire over short distances.

2797735596.name: GP-31 Grenade Pistol
2797735596.description: A pistol that fires grenades. Must be reloaded between shots.

2501707184.name: LAS-7 Dagger
2501707184.description: A laser pistol that fires a continuous beam. Does not require ammo but can overheat and need to change batteries.

1938200223.name: P-113 Verdict
1938200223.description: The gas-operated, semiautomatic P-113 chambers the 14mm "Rapid Deliberation," the largest centerfire cartridge of any magazine-fed pistol.

1312773632.name: P-69 Veto
1312773632.description: Loaded with jet-assisted rounds, this pistol is calibrated for creating and maintaining tactical distance from encroaching hostiles.

861637146.name: GP-20 Ultimatum
861637146.description: A pistol front-loaded with a single, powerful explosive. The weight of the projectile limits the weapon's range.

2018836169.name: M6C/SOCOM Pistol
2018836169.description:
A pistol with a built-in laser sight, suppressor, and flashlight.
Produced by Martian Armory.

1902682578.name: PLAS-15 Loyalist
1902682578.description: A plasma pistol that charges each shot until the trigger is released. Plasma projectiles explode on impact.

1374036584.name: P-4 Senator
1374036584.description: A high-damage revolver, which can be reloaded with single rounds. A heavy-hitting and reliable sidearm.

3201417018.name: RL-77 Airburst Rocket Launcher
3201417018.description: Fires a rocket that detonates within proximity of a target, and deploys a cluster of explosive bomblets.

2138935687.name: ARC-3 Arc Thrower
2138935687.description: Projects an arc of lightning at close range. Charges up to project bolts, and may discharge through multiple targets.

841182351.name: AC-8 Autocannon
841182351.description: A fully-automatic cannon effective against light vehicle armor. Includes support backpack required for reloading.

316296057.name: GL-28 Belt-Fed Grenade Launcher
316296057.description: A grenade launcher that can be fired continuously to deliver a nonstop barrage of explosives.

1725541340.name: TX-41 Sterilizer
1725541340.description: Atomizes caustic chemicals into a fine mist that liquifies sensitive electronics and tissues. Blinds and slows most enemies.

4001788629.name: MGX-42 Bullet Storm
4001788629.description: A single-use weapon sporting caseless ammunition stacked in multiple barrels. An electrical firing mechanism releases the rounds in rapid succession upon firing, after which the weapon is to be discarded.

4095488231.name: EAT-411 Leveller
4095488231.description: A single-use weapon firing a high-yield missile. Discarded after every use.

4189624954.name: EAT-700 Expendable Napalm
4189624954.description: A single-use weapon that fires a missile containing napalm cluster bombs that release upon impact.

202236804.name: FAF-14 Spear
202236804.description: An anti-tank homing missile which must lock onto its target before launch. Effective against large and armored enemies.

3564779466.name: StA-X3 W.A.S.P. Launcher
3564779466.description:
A versatile missile launcher loaded with seven lock-on homing missiles. These can either be fired from the launcher directly or as an airburst. Includes support backpack required for reloading.
Produced by Stål Arms.

1944161163.name: FLAM-40 Flamethrower
1944161163.description: An incendiary weapon for close range. Will ignite targets, terrain, and any flammable teammates.

1159284196.name: GL-21 Grenade Launcher
1159284196.description: A grenade launcher effective against armored infantry. Not intended for use against vehicle armor or fortified buildings.

3560739565.name: GL-52 De-Escalator
3560739565.description: A humane grenade launcher firing high-powered arc grenades.

4030799106.name: S-11 Speargun
4030799106.description: A speargun firing heavy-duty projectiles. These projectiles release a cloud of gas on impact, and must be carefully loaded one at a time.

2051054112.name: B/FLAM-80 Cremator
2051054112.description: Incendiary support fed by a massive backpack fuel tank. This heavy flamethrower enables a continuous column of fire to cleanse the battlefield.

4038802832.name: MG-206 Heavy Machine Gun
4038802832.description: A very powerful but difficult-to-wield machine gun with intense recoil.

961518079.name: LAS-98 Laser Cannon
961518079.description: A laser weapon firing a continuous beam. Doesn't require ammunition, but will need heat sink replaced if it overheats.

3212037062.name: MLS-4X Commando
3212037062.description: An expendable missile launcher equipped with four laser-guided missiles.

1597673685.name: LAS-99 Quasar Cannon
1597673685.description: Charges up to fire a powerful, explosive energy burst. Has a long cooldown period after firing.

1207425221.name: EAT-17 Expendable Anti-Tank
1207425221.description: A single-use weapon specialized for damaging vehicle armor. Discarded after every use.

934703916.name: MG-43 Machine Gun
934703916.description: A machine gun designed for stationary use. Trades higher power for increased recoil and reduced accuracy.

3659583399.name: M-1000 Maxigun
3659583399.description: A belt-fed minigun with an exceptional ammo capacity. Cannot be reloaded with standard non-belted munitions.

2918647117.name: Solo Silo Targeting Remote
2918647117.description: A targeting remote, used in combination with the Solo Silo.

2140866400.name: PLAS-45 Epoch
2140866400.description: A powerful plasma weapon that fires one blast at a time, each blast exploding on impact. Must be charged to fire. Warning: do not overcharge.

295440526.name: RS-422 Railgun
295440526.description: An experimental weapon which prioritizes armor penetration. Must be charged between shots - so choose targets carefully.

1594211884.name: GR-8 Recoilless Rifle
1594211884.description: A recoilless rifle effective against vehicle armor. Includes support backpack required for reloading.

376960160.name: APW-1 Anti-Materiel Rifle
376960160.description: A high-caliber sniper rifle effective over long distances against light vehicle armor. This rifle must be aimed downscope.
